   101

   103	Trang thai: DA HOAN THANH co ban

   105	  - types/index.ts → barrel export

   111	
   112	**FE-ARCH-03: TypeScript KHONG strict**
   113	
   114	```json
   115	// tsconfig.json hien tai — THIEU:
   116	{
   117	  "compilerOptions": {

   119	    // "strictNullChecks": true, ← KHONG CO
   120	    // "noImplicitAny": true,    ← KHONG CO

   122	}

   124	
   125	Hau qua: Null reference loi chi bi phat hien tai runtime, khong phai compile time. Authorization logic co the nhan `undefined` ma khong bao loi.
   126	
   127	**FE-ARCH-04: E2E coverage qua mong**
   128	
   129	```
   130	Unit tests: 107 files / 17,447 dong  ✅ Tot
   131	E2E tests:  7 specs  / ~600 dong     ❌ Qua it
   132	                                         CRC workflow 12 trang thai can it nhat 15-20 E2E specs

   134	
   135	### 2.2 Bao mat: 7.5 / 10
   136	
   137	#### Diem manh (+)
   138	
   139	| Kiem tra | Ket qua | Ghi chu |
   140	|----------|---------|---------|
   141	| Token storage | ✅ AN TOAN | httpOnly cookies, KHONG localStorage |
   142	| XSS vectors | ✅ AN TOAN | 0 dangerouslySetInnerHTML, 0 eval() trong app code |
   143	| Auto-refresh | ✅ TOT | 401 → refresh token → retry, transparent cho UX |
   144	| Tab eviction | ✅ TOT | TAB_EVICTED 409 response, ngat tab cu |
   145	| Request cancel | ✅ TOT | AbortController + cancelKey, ngat request trung lap |
   146	| Timeout | ✅ TOT | 45s hard timeout cho moi request |
   147

   149	
   150	**FE-SEC-01: hasPermission() implicit-allow — CRITICAL**
   151	
   152	```typescript
   153	// File: utils/authorization.ts
   154	// Dong 93-96:
   155	export const hasPermission = (user, permission) => {
   156	  if (!permission) return true;  // ← Khi permission = null/undefined → cho phep
   157	};
   158	
   159	// Dong 123:
   160	return hasPermission(user, TAB_PERMISSION_MAP[tabId] ?? null);
   161	// Khi tabId KHONG co trong MAP → null → hasPermission tra true → ALLOW
   162	
   163	// Kich ban nguy hiem:
   164	// 1. Developer them tab moi trong Sidebar.tsx
   165	// 2. Quen them vao TAB_PERMISSION_MAP
   166	// 3. Tab do tu dong public voi MOI user, ke ca guest
   167	```
   168	
   169	**FE-SEC-02: TypeScript khong strict anh huong authorization**
   170	
   171	Khi `strictNullChecks = false`:
   172	- `user.permissions` co the la `undefined` nhung TypeScript khong canh bao
   173	- `roles.includes('ADMIN')` co the nhan `undefined` array ma khong loi
   174	- Authorization bypass tinh vi qua type confusion
   175	
   176	**FE-SEC-03: Vite dev server expose 0.0.0.0**
   177	
   178	```typescript
   179	// vite.config.ts — host: true hoac host: '0.0.0.0'
   180	// Risk: Trong mang noi bo corporate, may khac co the truy cap dev server
   181	// Fix: host: '127.0.0.1' (chi localhost)
   182	```
   183	
   184	---
   185

   196	| Support services | 6 shared support services (Pagination, Sorting, Column, ...) |
   197	| Migration strategy | 177 migrations, proper indexes + FK + cascading deletes |
   198	| Model protection | 51/51 models dung `$fillable` whitelist |
   199	| Caching | `rememberTagged()` voi tag-based invalidation |
   200	| Async exports | `GenerateAsyncExportJob` queued, khong block request |
   201	| Schema guards | `hasColumn()`/`hasTable()` bao ve deploy errors |
   202	
   203	#### Diem yeu (-)
   204	
   205	**BE-ARCH-01: V5MasterDataController — DA TACH (wave-based)**
   206	
   207	```
   208	Trang thai hien tai:
   209	  - V5MasterDataController da duoc tach theo wave plan
   210	  - Routes da chuyen sang backend/routes/api/master-data.php
   211	  - V5MasterDataLegacyService.php chi con 25 dong (retired shell)
   212	  - Wave 01 (Vendor + Business + System): ✅ Done

   236	File: CustomerRequestCompatibilityLookupService.php
   237	Dong: 1,215

   239	```

   244	Hien tai: Khong co Dockerfile, docker-compose.yml

   250	
   251	### 3.2 Bao mat: 8.3 / 10
   252	
   253	#### Diem manh (+)
   254	
   255	| Kiem tra | Ket qua | Chi tiet ky thuat |
   256	|----------|---------|-------------------|
   257	| Authentication | ✅ 9/10 | Sanctum + httpOnly cookies, Bcrypt-12, password 12+ chars 4 classes |
   258	| Token lifecycle | ✅ 9/10 | Access 60min, Refresh 7d, tab token per-session |
   259	| CSRF protection | ✅ 8/10 | Sanctum CSRF middleware, SameSite=lax |
   260	| CSP header | ✅ 9/10 | `default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'` — NO unsafe-inline/eval |

261	| Security headers | ✅ 9/10 | HSTS, X-Frame-Options DENY, X-Content-Type nosniff |
   262	| SQL injection | ✅ 9/10 | Eloquent ORM + prepared statements, 0 exploitable |
   263	| Mass assignment | ✅ 9/10 | 51/51 models dung $fillable |
   264	| File upload | ✅ 8/10 | Whitelist MIME + extension + 20MB, rate limit 10/min |
   265	| Signed downloads | ✅ 9/10 | URL signing cho file downloads |
   266	| Audit trail | ✅ 9/10 | Auto INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE logging, AuditValueSanitizer |
   267	| Error handling | ✅ 8/10 | Generic error khi debug=false, ApiErrorResponse class |
   268	| Rate limiting | ✅ 7/10 | 3-tier (auth/write/heavy), three-part keys (user+IP+route) |
   269

   271	
   272	**BE-SEC-01: Production .env chua hardened — CRITICAL**
   273	
   274	```env
   275	# File: .env.example — can kiem tra va dam bao khi deploy production:
   276	
   277	VNPT_AUTH_COOKIE_SECURE=          # ← TRONG — phai la: true
   278	SESSION_ENCRYPT=false             # ← PHAI la: true
   279	VNPT_AUTH_COOKIE_SAME_SITE=lax   # ← NEN la: strict
   280	
   281	# Luu y: .env.example da co APP_DEBUG=false va LOG_LEVEL=warning.
   282	# Dam bao production .env phan anh dung cac gia tri nay.
   283	```
   284	
   285	Hau qua khi COOKIE_SECURE trong:
   286	- Cookie truyen qua HTTP khong ma hoa
   287	- Man-in-the-middle co the danh cap session token
   288	- Vi pham OWASP A07:2021 (Identification and Authentication Failures)
   289	
   290	**BE-SEC-02: CORS chua co config rieng**
   291	
   292	```
   293	Kiem tra: Khong tim thay config/cors.php
   294	Trang thai: Dang dung Laravel defaults
   295	Risk: Neu default cho phep '*' origins → API co the bi goi tu bat ky domain nao
   296	Fix: Tao config/cors.php voi whitelist cu the
   297	```
   298	
   299	**BE-SEC-03: GET endpoints khong rate limit**
   300	
   301	```
   302	Hien tai:
   303	  - POST/PUT/DELETE: 30 req/min  ✅
   304	  - Import/Export: 10 req/min    ✅
   305	  - Login: 5 req/min             ✅
   306	  - GET requests: KHONG GIOI HAN ❌
   307	
   308	Risk:
   309	  - Data scraping toan bo customer/contract data
   310	  - DoS qua GET flood
   311	  - Enumeration attack (brute-force IDs)
   312	```
   313	
   314	**BE-SEC-04: Ownership check thieu o service layer (tu bao cao 24/03)**
   315	
   316	```
   317	Van de: Route middleware kiem tra "user co permission 'customers.write'" nhung
   318	        KHONG kiem tra "user co so huu customer nay khong"
   319	Risk: IDOR — user A co the sua customer cua user B neu co cung permission
   320	Fix: Them ownership check trong DomainService truoc khi mutate
   321	```
   322	
   323	---
   324	
   325	## 4. Kiem tra doi chieu OWASP Top 10:2021
   326	
   327	> **Ghi chu:** Su dung OWASP Top 10:2021 lam baseline nhat quan vi da duoc tich hop trong bao cao 24/03. OWASP Top 10:2025 da duoc phat hanh — team nen ke hoach migration sang 2025 taxonomy trong Phase D (Compliance).
   328	
   329	| # | OWASP Category | Trang thai | Chi tiet |
   330	|---|---------------|------------|----------|
   331	| A01 | Broken Access Control | ⚠️ 7/10 | Route-level OK, thieu service-level ownership check |
   332	| A02 | Cryptographic Failures | ✅ 9/10 | Bcrypt-12, nhung COOKIE_SECURE chua bat |
   333	| A03 | Injection | ✅ 9/10 | Eloquent ORM, prepared statements |
   334	| A04 | Insecure Design | ⚠️ 6/10 | App.tsx god component, implicit-allow pattern |
   335	| A05 | Security Misconfiguration | ⚠️ 7/10 | CSP tot, nhung .env chua hardened |
   336	| A06 | Vulnerable Components | ✅ 8/10 | Laravel 12 + PHP 8.2 current, 7 npm vulns dev-only |
   337	| A07 | Identification & Auth Failures | ✅ 9/10 | 3-token system, password policy manh |
   338	| A08 | Software & Data Integrity | ✅ 8/10 | Audit logging, signed downloads |
   339	| A09 | Security Logging & Monitoring | ✅ 8/10 | AuditService + AuditValueSanitizer |
   340	| A10 | Server-Side Request Forgery | ✅ 9/10 | Khong co user-controlled URL fetch |
   341	
   342	### Tong diem OWASP Top 10:2021: 80/100 — Dat muc "Tot", can nang len "Xuat sac" (90+)
   343

   345	
   346	## 5. Lo trinh nang cap kien truc — 4 Phase
   347	
   348	### Phase 1: Foundation (Tuan 1-2) — Muc tieu: 7.5/10
   349	
   350	| # | Task | Layer | File bi touch | Do kho | Gia tri |
   351	|---|------|-------|---------------|--------|---------|
   352	| 1.1 | Bat TypeScript `strictNullChecks` | FE | `tsconfig.json` + ~50-80 file fix | Trung binh | CAO |
   353	| 1.2 | Fix `hasPermission()` implicit-allow | FE | `utils/authorization.ts` | Thap | CRITICAL |
   354	| 1.3 | Vite dev server bind 127.0.0.1 | FE | `vite.config.ts` | Thap | Trung binh |
   355	
   356	#### 1.1 Chi tiet: Bat TypeScript strictNullChecks
   357	
   358	```json
   359	// tsconfig.json — buoc 1:
   360	{
   361	  "compilerOptions": {
   362	    "strictNullChecks": true
   363	  }
   364	}
   365	```
   366	
   367	Quy trinh:
   368	1. Bat `strictNullChecks` trong `tsconfig.json`
   369	2. Chay `npm run lint` (tsc --noEmit)
   370	3. Fix tung loi — uu tien `utils/authorization.ts` va `shared/api/apiFetch.ts` truoc
   371	4. Phan loai loi: (a) them `!` non-null assertion cho truong hop chac chan, (b) them null check cho truong hop can guard
   372	5. KHONG dung `// @ts-ignore` — moi loi phai duoc fix dung cach
   373	
   374	Du kien: 200-400 loi TypeScript, mat 3-5 ngay dev
   375	
   376	#### 1.2 Chi tiet: Fix hasPermission() implicit-allow
   377	
   378	```typescript
   379	// TRUOC (nguy hiem):
   380	export const canAccessTab = (user: AuthUser | null, tabId: string): boolean => {
   381	  return hasPermission(user, TAB_PERMISSION_MAP[tabId] ?? null);
   382	  // tabId khong co trong map → null → true → ALLOW
   383	};
   384	
   385	// SAU (an toan):
   386	export const canAccessTab = (user: AuthUser | null, tabId: string): boolean => {
   387	  if (tabId === 'support_master_management') {
   388	    return (
   389	      hasPermission(user, 'support_requests.read')
   390	      || hasPermission(user, 'support_service_groups.read')
   391	      || hasPermission(user, 'support_contact_positions.read')
   392	    );
   393	  }
   394	
   395	  const permission = TAB_PERMISSION_MAP[tabId];
   396	  if (permission === undefined) {
   397	    // Tab chua duoc map → DENY by default
   398	    if (process.env.NODE_ENV === 'development') {
   399	      console.warn(`[Auth] Tab '${tabId}' missing from TAB_PERMISSION_MAP — denied`);
   400	    }
   401	    return false;
   402	  }
   403	
   404	  // permission === null → intentionally public tab (e.g. dashboard)
   405	  return hasPermission(user, permission);
   406	};
   407	```
   408	
   409	---
   410

   426	#### 2.1 Chi tiet: Tach App.tsx → Zustand stores
   427	
   428	Thu tu tach (moi entity la 1 PR rieng):
   429	
   430	```
   431	Buoc 1: contractStore.ts (PR #1)
   432	  - Di chuyen: contracts state, handleSave/Delete/Load Contract
   433	  - Hook: useContractStore() thay the App.tsx props
   434	  - Test: Chay toan bo contract-related unit + E2E
   435	
   436	Buoc 2: customerStore.ts (PR #2)
   437	  - Tuong tu pattern buoc 1
   438	
   439	Buoc 3: employeeStore.ts (PR #3)
   440	
   441	Buoc 4: projectStore.ts (PR #4)
   442	
   443	Buoc 5: productStore.ts (PR #5)
   444	
   445	... lap lai cho tung entity ...
   446	
   447	Ket qua: App.tsx giam tu 1,563 → ~800 dong (routing + layout)

   449	
   450	Pattern cho moi store:
   451	```typescript
   452	// shared/stores/contractStore.ts
   453	import { create } from 'zustand';
   454	import { Contract, PaginatedResponse } from '../types';
   455	import * as contractApi from '../services/api/contractApi';
   456	
   457	interface ContractState {
   458	  contracts: Contract[];
   459	  meta: PaginatedResponse['meta'] | null;
   460	  loading: boolean;
   461	  // CRUD actions
   462	  loadPage: (query: Record<string, unknown>) => Promise<void>;
   463	  save: (data: Partial<Contract>) => Promise<void>;
   464	  remove: (id: number) => Promise<void>;
   465	}
   466	
   467	export const useContractStore = create<ContractState>((set, get) => ({
   468	  contracts: [],
   469	  meta: null,
   470	  loading: false,
   471	  loadPage: async (query) => {
   472	    set({ loading: true });
   473	    try {
   474	      const res = await contractApi.list(query);
   475	      set({ contracts: res.data, meta: res.meta });
   476	    } finally {
   477	      set({ loading: false });
   478	    }
   479	  },
   480	  save: async (data) => { /* ... */ },
   481	  remove: async (id) => { /* ... */ },
   482	}));
   483	```
   484

   498	
   499	Luu y: CaseWriteOrchestrator giu public API giong nhu WriteService cu
   500	       → Controller khong can thay doi
   501	```

   864	## Phu luc B: Scoring Rubric
   865	
   866	### Phuong phap tinh diem
   867	
   868	Moi hang muc (20 items trong bang 1.2) duoc cham theo thang 1-10:
   869	- **9-10:** Industry-leading, khong co gap nao dang ke, evidence trong code
   870	- **7-8:** Tot, 1-2 minor gaps, co mitigation
   871	- **5-6:** Trung binh, co gaps can xu ly nhung khong co exploit truc tiep
   872	- **3-4:** Yeu, co risk cu the co the khai thac
   873	- **1-2:** Nghiem trong, co loi bao mat hoac kien truc da biet
   874	
   875	### Nguon bang chung cho moi diem
   876	
   877	| # | Hang muc | Evidence source | Kiem tra bang |
   878	|---|----------|----------------|---------------|
   879	| 1 | BE Auth | `config/vnpt_auth.php`, `UseSanctumCookieToken.php` | Doc config + middleware |
   880	| 2 | SQL Injection | Grep `DB::raw`, `DB::select` trong toan bo `app/` | `rg 'DB::raw' backend/app` |
   881	| 3 | Route Auth | `routes/api.php` middleware stack | Dem routes co `auth:sanctum` |
   882	| 4 | Service Auth | `app/Policies/*.php`, `UserAccessService.php` | Endpoint-to-policy matrix |
   883	| 5-12 | BE khac | Config files, middleware, service code | Doc truc tiep |
   884	| 13-15 | FE Security | `apiFetch.ts`, browser DevTools cookie tab | Doc code + runtime check |
   885	| 16 | FE AuthZ | `authorization.ts`, `__tests__/authorization.test.ts` | Unit test + code review |
   886	| 17 | FE State | `wc -l App.tsx`, `ls shared/stores/` | Dem dong + dem files |
   887	| 18 | FE Org | `ls types/`, `cat tsconfig.json` | Dem files + check config |
   888	| 19 | TS Safety | `tsconfig.json` strict flags | `rg strict tsconfig.json` |
   889	| 20 | Test Coverage | `find __tests__ -name '*.test.*' \| wc -l`, `find e2e -name '*.spec.*' \| wc -l` | Dem files |
   890	
   891	### Cach tinh diem tong
   892	
   893	```
   894	Quy tac lam tron: round to nearest 0.5 (conservative — lam tron xuong khi giua)
   895	
   896	Diem FE bao mat = avg(#13, #14, #15, #16) = (9+9+8+5)/4 = 7.75 → 7.5
   897	Diem FE kien truc = avg(#17, #18, #19, #20) = (5.5+6.5+4+6)/4 = 5.5 → 6.0 (round up vi types.ts refactor da done)
   898	Diem BE bao mat = avg(#1..#9) = (9+9+8+6+8+9+7+9+8)/9 = 8.11 → 8.0
   899	Diem BE kien truc = avg(#10, #11, #12) = (7.5+8+8)/3 = 7.83 → 8.0
   900	
   901	Diem layer = (Kien truc + Bao mat) / 2
   902	  FE: (6.0 + 7.5) / 2 = 6.75 → 6.7
   903	  BE: (8.0 + 8.3) / 2 = 8.15 → 8.1
   904	
   905	Diem tong = (FE + BE) / 2 = (6.7 + 8.1) / 2 = 7.4
   906	```

   543	#### 3.2 Chi tiet: GET rate limiting

   545	```php
   546	// app/Providers/AppServiceProvider.php — them:
   547	RateLimiter::for('api.read', function (Request $request) {
   548	    return Limit::perMinute(120)
   549	        ->by($request->user()?->id . '|' . $request->ip() . '|' . $request->path());
   550	});
   551	
   552	// routes/api.php — apply vao GET routes:
   553	Route::middleware(['throttle:api.read'])->group(function () {
   554	    // Tat ca GET endpoints hien tai
   555	});
   556	```

   561	// config/cors.php — TAO MOI
   562	return [
   563	    'paths' => ['api/*', 'sanctum/csrf-cookie'],
   564	    'allowed_methods' => ['GET', 'POST', 'PUT', 'PATCH', 'DELETE', 'OPTIONS'],
   565	    'allowed_origins' => explode(',', env('CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS', '')),
   566	    'allowed_origins_patterns' => [],
   567	    'allowed_headers' => ['Content-Type', 'X-Requested-With', 'Authorization', 'X-Tab-Token', 'Accept'],

   609	#### 4.1 Chi tiet: Docker setup
   610	
   611	```yaml
   612	# docker-compose.yml
   613	services:
   614	  app:
   615	    build:
   616	      context: ./backend
   617	      dockerfile: Dockerfile
   618	    ports:
   619	      - "8002:8002"
   620	    environment:
   621	      - APP_ENV=production
   622	      - APP_DEBUG=false
   623	      - DB_HOST=mysql
   624	      - REDIS_HOST=redis
   625	    depends_on:
   626	      mysql:
   627	        condition: service_healthy
   628	      redis:
   629	        condition: service_started
   630	    volumes:
   631	      - storage:/var/www/html/storage
   632	
   633	  queue:
   634	    build:
   635	      context: ./backend
   636	      dockerfile: Dockerfile
   637	    command: php artisan queue:listen --tries=3 --timeout=300
   638	    depends_on:
   639	      - app
   640	
   641	  frontend:
   642	    build:
   643	      context: ./frontend
   644	      dockerfile: Dockerfile
   645	    ports:
   646	      - "5174:80"
   647	
   648	  mysql:
   649	    image: mysql:8.0
   650	    environment:
   651	      MYSQL_DATABASE: vnpt_business
   652	      MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: "${DB_PASSWORD}"
   653	    volumes:
   654	      - mysql_data:/var/lib/mysql
   655	    healthcheck:
   656	      test: ["CMD", "mysqladmin", "ping", "-h", "localhost"]
   657	      interval: 10s
   658	      retries: 5
   659	
   660	  redis:
   661	    image: redis:7-alpine
   662	    volumes:
   663	      - redis_data:/data
   664	
   665	volumes:
   666	  storage:
   667	  mysql_data:
   668	  redis_data:
   669	```
   670	
   671	#### 4.5 Chi tiet: Security scanning trong CI
   672	
   673	```yaml
   674	# .github/workflows/security.yml
   675	name: Security Scan
   676	on:
   677	  push:
   678	    branches: [main]
   679	  schedule:
   680	    - cron: '0 6 * * 1'  # Moi thu Hai
   681	
   682	jobs:
   683	  php-security:
   684	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
   685	    steps:
   686	      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
   687	      - name: PHP Security Checker
   688	        run: |
   689	          cd backend
   690	          composer audit
   691	      - name: PHPStan (static analysis)
   692	        run: |
   693	          cd backend
   694	          vendor/bin/phpstan analyse --level=6
   695	
   696	  npm-audit:
   697	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
   698	    steps:
   699	      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
   700	      - name: NPM Audit
   701	        run: |
   702	          cd frontend
   703	          npm audit --production --audit-level=high
   704	
   705	  dependency-review:
   706	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
   707	    if: github.event_name == 'pull_request'
   708	    steps:
   709	      - uses: actions/dependency-review-action@v4
   710	        with:
   711	          fail-on-severity: high
   712	```

   716	## 6. Lo trinh an toan thong tin — 4 Phase
   717	
   718	### Phase A: Emergency Fixes (Truoc khi len Production) — 1-2 ngay
   719	
   720	| # | Fix | File | Thoi gian | Trang thai |
   721	|---|-----|------|-----------|------------|
   722	| A1 | VNPT_AUTH_COOKIE_SECURE=true | `.env.production` | 5 phut | ❌ Chua lam |
   723	| A2 | SESSION_ENCRYPT=true | `.env.production` | 5 phut | ❌ Chua lam |
   724	| A3 | VNPT_AUTH_COOKIE_SAME_SITE=strict | `.env.production` | 5 phut | ❌ Chua lam |
   725	| A4 | APP_DEBUG=false | `.env.production` | 5 phut | ❌ Chua lam |
   726	| A5 | LOG_LEVEL=warning | `.env.production` | 5 phut | ❌ Chua lam |

   729	| A8 | Audit IDOR risk + extend existing Policies cho 4 key entities (Contract, Customer, Invoice, CRC) | `app/Policies/*.php`, DomainServices | 3 ngay | ❌ Chua lam |

   733	- Phase 3.1 mo rong cho TAT CA mutating endpoints (post-go-live hardening)

item.text: I’ve narrowed it down. Most of Round 2’s problems are fixed, but one fix is still not grounded in the repo state, and the scoring appendix still contradicts its own math and rounding rule.

item.text:
### ISSUE-2: Stale frontend baseline is still not fully corrected
- Category: correctness
- Severity: medium
- Plan section: `### 1.2 Diem chi tiet theo hang muc`; `### 2.1 Kien truc`
- Problem: The Round 3 plan still understates the current Zustand/shared-store footprint and unit-test count, so the “fixed” baseline is still not fully aligned to the repository.
- Evidence: The plan says `Zustand co shared stores (uiStore, toastStore, revenueStore)` at line 55 and `3 shared stores` at line 80, but current files under [frontend/shared/stores](/Users/pvro86gmail.com/Downloads/QLCV/frontend/shared/stores) include `authStore.ts`, `filterStore.ts`, `modalStore.ts`, `revenueStore.ts`, `toastStore.ts`, and `uiStore.ts`. The plan also says `107 unit tests` at lines 58 and 130, while the current repo has 110 non-E2E test/spec files.
- Why it matters: Acceptance criterion (5) requires the scoring baseline to be defensible from the codebase. The latest revision is better, but it still contains factual drift.
- Suggested fix: Recount the current frontend shared stores and non-E2E tests from the repo and update the state-management/test-coverage evidence lines to match.

### ISSUE-6: The scoring rubric still contradicts its own calculations
- Category: correctness
- Severity: high
- Plan section: `## 1. Bang diem tong hop`; `## Phu luc B: Scoring Rubric`
- Problem: The new scoring appendix still does not produce the published numbers, and it breaks its own stated rounding rule.
- Evidence: Line 894 says `round to nearest 0.5`, but line 897 shows `avg(#17, #18, #19, #20) = 5.5 → 6.0`, which is neither mathematically correct nor consistent with the stated rule. Line 898 shows `Diem BE bao mat ... = 8.11 → 8.0`, but the published backend security score is `8.3 / 10` at lines 32 and 251. Lines 902-905 then round layer totals to tenths, not to the stated `0.5` rule.
- Why it matters: Acceptance criterion (5) is still not met. Reviewers still cannot reproduce the plan’s numbers from the rubric, so the scoring remains non-auditable.
- Suggested fix: Use one explicit rounding rule for every level of the model, recalculate all derived scores from that rule, and ensure the appendix matches the published tables exactly.

### VERDICT
- Status: REVISE
- Reason: Round 3 fixes most prior issues, but the plan still has residual baseline drift and the scoring methodology remains internally inconsistent.
